paymentsSection.paymobReconciliationDesc: All Paymob transactions are stored in the payment_records table. Pending or failed payments can be reviewed and reconciled with the monthly Paymob statement.
paymentsSection.confirmApproveDesc: This will activate the subscription of "{{storeName}}" on the {{plan}} plan and generate a paid invoice automatically.
paymentsSection.rejectDesc: The merchant will be notified of the rejection. You can add an explanatory note.

toggleStatus.reactivateDesc: The store "{{storeName}}" will be reactivated immediately and an email will be sent to the merchant.
toggleStatus.suspendDesc: The store "{{storeName}}" will be temporarily suspended and a warning email will be sent to the merchant. All data will be preserved.

onboarding.s1: The customer enters your store and looks for a trust signal: a clear name, a reassuring description, and a layout that matches your brand.
onboarding.ch2: Chapter 2: A Interface that Tells a Story
onboarding.s2: Before the customer browses the products, they need a sentence and an image that say: this store is designed for you.
onboarding.s3: The store really starts when the customer sees a product with a clear image, price, and stock.
onboarding.s4: After liking the product, the customer asks: when will it arrive and for how much? Keep the answer ready.
onboarding.s5: In the final step, the customer needs a clear and reassuring payment method, especially with Cash on Delivery.
onboarding.s6: Open the store as a new customer: the interface, product, shipping, and payment should feel like one journey.

kpi.noData: No data yet, but your journey is just beginning. Your first sale is right around the corner! ✨
kpi.noDataSub: This dashboard is ready to showcase your success. Let's get those orders rolling!

header.title: Store Settings
header.subtitle: Customize your store's appearance and basic data

guide.title: How to configure your store settings?
guide.desc: This page controls how your store looks to the world. Set it up well once and you will feel the difference in sales.
guide.step1Desc: A clear name and engaging description help customers quickly understand what you sell.
guide.step2Desc: The logo and cover photo are the first things a customer sees — make them professional.
guide.step3Desc: Choose a color that reflects your brand identity and stick with it everywhere.
guide.step4Desc: Search title and description help you appear in Google results.
guide.tip1: A circular 200x200 px logo looks best on mobile.
guide.tip2: The ideal cover photo: 1400x600 px in high quality.
guide.tip3: Add a WhatsApp number to increase direct communication with customers.

identity.linkHint: The link is fixed and cannot be changed after the store is created

guide.title: How to manage your orders?
guide.description: Here you find all orders from your store. Click on any order to view details and update its status.

step1.title: Receive Order
step1.desc: When a new order arrives, you will get a notification review it within 24 hours.

step2.title: Confirm & Prepare
step2.desc: Change status to Confirmed when verifying and preparing the order.

step3.title: Shipping & Delivery
step3.desc: When sending for shipping, change status to Shipped and add tracking number.

step4.title: After Delivery
step4.desc: Follow up with the customer to ensure satisfaction and encourage reviews.

tips: Respond to COD orders within 2 hours to reduce cancellation rate.
Use the Pending filter to show orders that need immediate attention.
Send a WhatsApp message immediately after confirming an order to build trust.

guide.title: Understand Your Customer Base
guide.description: Here you find every customer who has placed an order. Search for any customer and view their purchase history and confirmation rate.
tips: Customers with low confirmation rate (under 50%) — follow up before packing.
Repeat customers are your true treasure — send them special offers.
A verified phone number means a more reliable customer for COD orders.

pricing.title: Choose the right plan for you
pricing.subtitle: Start your journey with confidence — and upgrade anytime as your store grows

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I change my plan anytime?
faq.a1: Yes — contact our support team and we will upgrade or downgrade immediately.
faq.q2: What happens if I exceed the order limit?
faq.a2: Your store will not stop — we will contact you to upgrade your plan when you approach the limit.
faq.a3: Of course — each store is completely independent and isolated from the rest.

home.subtitle: Nour is a 100% Egyptian SaaS platform enabling merchants to create professional fashion and beauty stores — with Paymob, Bosta, and WhatsApp ready from day one.
home.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

features.title: Everything you need to succeed
features.subtitle: A complete platform designed specifically for the Egyptian market — no compromise on details.
features.f1_desc: Create your professional online store instantly without technical experience — your link, your design, your brand.
features.f2_desc: Paymob ready from day one — Visa, Fawry, E-wallets, and COD. All Egyptian payment methods in one place.
features.f3_desc: Create Bosta shipments directly from your dashboard, track orders, and manage COD with one click.
features.f4_desc: Send order confirmations to your customers automatically via WhatsApp.
features.f5_desc: An Arabic dashboard giving you a complete overview: your revenue, top selling products, and new customers count.
features.f6_desc: Add managers and staff to your store with different permissions — owner, manager, staff. Full control over who accesses what.

steps.title: Start in just 3 steps
steps.s1_desc: Create your account for free in seconds — no credit card required.
steps.s2_desc: Add your products, images, categories and draw your store identity.
steps.s3_desc: Share your store link and start receiving orders immediately.

pricing.title: Transparent and simple
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees — no commission on your sales.

testimonials.title: What our merchants say
testimonials.t1_text: I opened my store in less than an hour and received my first order the same day! Nour changed my professional life.
testimonials.t2_text: Payment via Paymob and Bosta shipping with one click — saved me hours every day.
testimonials.t3_text: Automated WhatsApp messages doubled customer satisfaction. Exceptional product.

cta.title: Ready to open your store?
cta.subtitle: Join more than 500 Egyptian merchants building their commercial future with Nour.

assistantNotes.trust-strip: Assure customers of your product quality and easy shipping/returns.
assistantNotes.testimonials: Customer reviews increase the credibility of your store.
assistantNotes.newsletter: Collect emails for continuous communication with your customers.
assistantNotes.whatsapp: Easy communication increases the chance of completing an order.
assistantNotes.lookbook: Showcase your products in an attractive and inspiring way.
assistantNotes.instagram: Connect your store to your social media accounts.
assistantNotes.faq: Answer common questions to facilitate the buying process.
assistantNotes.offers: Offers encourage customers to buy now.
assistantNotes.product-catalog: Display all your products in an organized way.

desc.identity: Store name, WhatsApp number, and main image

desc.shipping: Add delivery zones to enable cash on delivery
desc.preview: Browse your store as a customer to ensure it is ready

publishReview.title: Final Store Review

publishReview.notReadyTitle: Your store story is almost complete
